official_release.history_observation: The fetched official repository has one reachable commit; HEAD and the root commit are identical.
official_release.relationship_to_paper: The sole official commit is seven days after the initial arXiv submission but three months before immutable v4. It contains an AgencyBench-v2 instrument and paper/README snapshot, but timing and the observed implementation/manuscript differences do not establish exact v4 paper-time identity. Release observations are therefore reported separately from v4 claims.

scope_limit: The immutable v4 paper and complete official pinned checkout were read/inspected. Static parsing covered all 32 description files, 32 runners, and 32 sample meta-evaluation files. One Gomoku scenario was traced through its complete specification, runner, artifact collection, feedback, and released sample record. The Docker image and hosted SII/model services were not executed; no paper model suite was rerun, and the release contains no complete paper result corpus or table-reproduction command.
